name: copilot:paused
description: Skip the auto-request-review workflow on this PR until removed.

name: copilot:loop-exhausted
description: Lifetime cap of Copilot review requests reached for this PR; PR was parked in draft.

name: copilot:force-review
description: Operator override: bypass the cap and request a Copilot review now (single-shot; auto-removed after firing).
